name: system-prompt
description: Manage system prompts — persistent instructions appended to every USERINPUT output

list.description: List current system prompts with indices

delete.description: Remove a system prompt by its index

gui.description: Open the visual system prompt editor

move-up.description: Move a prompt one position up

move-down.description: Move a prompt one position down

move-to-top.description: Move a prompt to the top

move-to-bottom.description: Move a prompt to the bottom
